item.title: SIM Card Reader Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Reader Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Reader Tool
(Office Apps)
Mobile phone SIM card data recovery is non destructive and read only software to recover all accidently deleted SIM card memory data and information. Software restores all SIM card deleted name, phone numbers (phone book directory), lost SMS and text messages. SIM card information backup device required PC/SC standards based SIM card reader with Microsoft windows operating system. Application does not recover data if SIM card is being locked due to security PIN code or other password code. Cell phone SIM card data retrieval software back up all deleted messages, contact numbers, phone book directory and sent item message. SIM card data recovery tool provides full back up of your mobile phone SIM card memory and recover your recently call list information rescue deleted text messages (SMS) from inbox outbox and sent item. Restoration utility analyze SIM card through SIM card reader (any company) and recover virus corrupted lost information of mobile phone. Recovery tool unerase erased SIM identification number and help in investigation. Features:* Support all 3G/GSM mobile phone service network.* Software support SIM card only if SIM card is not blocked.* Provides full back up of SIM card memory of your mobile cell phone.* Its retrieve all deleted text message, contact numbers or other information from virus infected SIM card.* Software required USB SIM card reader or PC/SC standards based SIM card reader.* Utility supports all window operating system like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7.

[read more]

item.title: USB Recovery for Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Recovery for Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
USB Recovery for Mac
(Utilities)
Technically powerful Apple MAC OS X USB recovery application for Mac exclusively designed and developed for all those user who accidentally format Pen drive and result all important data lost. Download freeware USB recovery for Mac software to restore corrupted compressed, encrypted or raw files from bad sector affected USB Flash drive without any manual work. Advance featured MAC data revival utility used to recover lost crucial and important business documents after performing ‘Delete All’ operation in few simple and countable steps. USB recovery for Mac application developed with advance algorithms and cutting edge techniques that help in retrieval of images and video from infected pen drive in most cost effective manner. Wonderful MAC risk free file retrieval utility facilitates user to restore corrupted MS office documents including doc, txt, xls etc without acquiring any technical knowledge. Easy to use yet effective USB recovery for Mac utility inaccessible text files and folders from all types of USB drives. Mac pen drive file salvage utility provides fast data recovery process for retrieval of accidentally formatted mp3 or mp4 music file from various formats USB drives including Pen drive, Zip drive, Flash drive, Thumb drive, memory sticks etc of any manufactures. Affordable data retrieval utility for MAC USB drive easily reclaims missing and misplaced documents of any type of data including movie, song, photo, picture, wallpaper, animated images etc from Pen drive of any higher capacity and brands. Features: * USB drive data restoration software professionally capable in recovery of corrupted spreadsheets and power point files from virus infected Pen drive. * USB recovery for Mac software easily install on laptop or PC having any latest version of MAC OS, 256MB RAM and 10 MB free Hard Disk Space. * USB recovery for Mac utility smoothly work with Transcends, Kingston, Lexar, Sony or other brands USB drive for restoration of missing data.

[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Searching software that is cost effective and easy to handle for quick and effective recovery of deleted documents? Now Advance Pen Drive Recovery application is available at company www.pendriverecovery.org website has ability to regain files like images, pictures, text files, documents, photo, audio, video, clip, music and much more from removable media device memory. Lost data recovery program is made to retrieve accidentally deleted or corrupted pictures inaccessible storage of removable media device.

[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
USB drive data recovery utility is help to restore accidently delete, corrupt, damage file, folders, important document from removable device in few mouse clicks. Pen drive retriever software restores image, video, music, and other record from crashed, inaccessible and corrupt USB media. USB recovery is inexpensive and simple utility to retrieve record, document or text file, folder damage or corrupt by virus, worm etc from removable drive.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Zune Files Salvage Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Zune Files Salvage Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Zune Files Salvage Tool
(Office Apps)
Zune Diagnostic Mode recovery utility supports retrieval of following formats of file for audio MP3 (.mp3), AAC (Low complexity), (.aac, .mp4, .m4a, .m4b, .mov), WMA (.wma), for video MPEG4 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), WMV (.wmv), H.264 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), ASF (.asf) and for still images JPEG (.jpg). Zune music files recovery software recovers virus affected deleted zunes synchronized music files, podcasts, digital pictures and audio videos files. Zune diagnostic problem solution utility restores corrupted Windows Media Players audio video music files. Zune disk mode error solution data recovery utility restores crashed zunes deleted files. Zune lost file recovery software repairs water damaged zunes streamed files and folder. Zune problem solving utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk and recovers zune library music files and folder safely. Zune backup data recovery software supports windows operating system including Windows 11, Windows 10,Windows 8, Windows 7, Windows XP (Home, Media center) and windows Vista. Feature:* Zune data recovery tool restores missing audio video clips, movie clip, digital picture and still images from digital media player.* Frozen zune recovery software recovers all the deleted audio video files and folders from damaged zune.* Zune drive data recovery utility restores music files even “drive not formatted” or “Device in not recognized” message is displayed on the screen.* Zune file recovery software retrieves deleted data which lost due to zunes wireless networking ability.* Zune audio video files retrieval tool retrieves music files from damaged Zune music player.* Zune data recovery tool is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.

[read more]
item.description:
Zune Files Salvage Tool
(Office Apps)
Zune Diagnostic Mode recovery utility supports retrieval of following formats of file for audio MP3 (.mp3), AAC (Low complexity), (.aac, .mp4, .m4a, .m4b, .mov), WMA (.wma), for video MPEG4 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), WMV (.wmv), H.264 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), ASF (.asf) and for still images JPEG (.jpg). [read more]

item.title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Are you sad after losing Mobile Phone priceless and valuable data? Don’t worry, just visit company website to download cell phone data recovery Mac software to reclaim all lost crucial contact numbers, photographs or other data from different type of mobile phones in less span of time. Innovative MAC mobile phone data undelete software empower with in-depth scanning and searching techniques that allowed user to bring back crucial data that lost due to any reason from mobile device within less span of time. Reliable MAC mobile phone data revival program restore accidentally deleted images, wedding photographs, memorable audio/video clipping, MP3 music or other data in few simple mouse clicks. Cell phone recovery Mac utility is fully capable to rescue lost business important and personal contact numbers along with their name or other details. Proficient mobile phone data undelete software easily restore wallpapers, screen savers, themes or animated pictures from formatted or logically crashed cellular phone of any manufacturer or brand. Professional data undelete utility offers a risk free solution to user for recovery of mobile phone stored data in most efficient and effective manner. Cell phone retrieval Mac tool provides comprehensive and safe recovery of lost precious snaps, images, photographs, or sound clips from damaged mobile phone at affordable price. Mobile phone data recovery software restores every single byte of lost data due to hardware/software error, accidental deletion, virus attacks etc. Features: * Cell phone data recovery Mac utility provides high resolution preview of missing data and files before actual retrieval process. * Cell phone data restoration utility has user friendly GUI and help guide that allow user to easily access software and perform recovery task without any guidance and help. * Mobile data rescue tool for Apple Macintosh OS X supports various types of mobile phones including Nokia, Blackberry, Motorola, Sony Ericsson etc.

[read more]

item.title: Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Pro Duo memory card files recovery software salvage retrieve restore formatted corrupted office documents, digital pictures, mobile phone audio video songs, SMS, MMS, snaps and text messages from multimedia memory card. Fujifilm XD cards recovery utility support all type of media file like MPEG, WAV, MP3, AVI, GIF, BMP, JPEG, JPG and MIDI which are lost due to virus infection, software hardware malfunction, human errors, improper handling.

[read more]

item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities

- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok

- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions

- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService

- Disabled mandatory login

- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion
(Utilities)
ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion Software is a wonderful solution that converts OST to HTML format quickly and easily. Users can quickly convert OST files to HTML files with the help of this tool. The software that converts OST files to HTML can handle OST files with ease. The program's batch conversion capability allows users to convert OST to HTML layout in bulk. It only takes three or four simple steps to transfer this highly user-friendly application. Utilizing the software does not need users to be extremely adept at using technology. Users can convert a folder holding a few OST updates to HTML using the OST to HTML Conversion program. The Outlook OST to HTML program supports every version of Microsoft Outlook, including 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, and previous versions. You can utilize the free demo version of the OST to HTML Conversion program on any Windows operating system, such as 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, XP, Vista, and others. The most recent demo version of this software is available for free download and use.
Read More: - http://www.toolsbaer.com/ost-to-html-conversion/
[read more]
